title: Piquant Jammy Ikura Pasta
description: A creamy and savory Croatian-inspired dish featuring ikura in a pasta water emulsion, served in a banana leaf.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook 8 oz of pasta al dente according to package instructions.
Drain the pasta and reserve 1 cup of pasta water for the emulsion.
In a blender or food processor, combine the reserved pasta water, 2 tablespoons of olive oil, 1 tablespoon of lemon juice, and a pinch of salt, and blend until smooth.
Add the ikura to the blender and blend until the mixture is well combined and slightly thickened.
Season the ikura mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of cooked pasta on a banana leaf, followed by a spoonful of the ikura mixture, and garnish with chopped fresh herbs such as parsley or dill.
